name_en: Port of Santa Cruz de Tenerife
name_local: Puerto de Santa Cruz de Tenerife

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cruise ship terminal is
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría indicarme dónde está la terminal de cruceros?
phrases.pronunciation: poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tehr-mee-NAHL deh kroo-SEH-rohs?

likely_response.local: Siga el Muelle Norte hasta el edificio azul.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah EHL moo-EHL-leh NOHR-teh AH-stah EHL eh-dee-fee-THEE-oh ah-THOOL
likely_response.translation_en: It is signed towards the right, following the pier.

responses.english: It is signed towards the right, following the pier.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah EHL moo-EHL-leh NOHR-teh AH-stah EHL eh-dee-fee-THEE-oh ah-THOOL
responses.french: Siga el Muelle Norte hasta el edificio azul.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the inter-island ferry departs
phrases.text_local: ¿Desde qué muelle sale el ferry interinsular?
phrases.pronunciation: deh-SDEH keh MWEL-yeh SAH-leh el FEH-rree een-teh-reens-oo-LAHR?

likely_response.local: Salen desde el muelle número dos generalmente.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAH-lehn DEH-sdeh EHL moo-EHL-leh NÚ-meh-roh DOHS heh-neh-rahl-MEHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: They leave from dock number two generally.

responses.english: They leave from dock number two generally.
responses.phonetic: SAH-lehn DEH-sdeh EHL moo-EHL-leh NÚ-meh-roh DOHS heh-neh-rahl-MEHN-teh
responses.french: Salen desde el muelle número dos generalmente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find port facilities
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde están los servicios para pasajeros del puerto?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿DON-deh eh-STAHN lohs ser-BEE-see-ohs pah-rah pah-sah-HEH-rohs del PWEHR-toh?

likely_response.local: Junto al Muelle Norte, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL moo-EHL-leh NOHR-teh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: They are located near the main entrance.

responses.english: They are located near the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL moo-EHL-leh NOHR-teh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto al Muelle Norte, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de ferrys?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh FEH-rees?

likely_response.local: En el edificio principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL eh-dee-fee-THEE-oh preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the main building, on the right.

responses.english: At the main building, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL eh-dee-fee-THEE-oh preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En el edificio principal, a la derecha.
